---
title: "Beatrix Feodore Cresswell"
---

## Beatrix Feodore Cresswell

**Dates:** (1862-1940)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1890-2), local historian

### Biography

According to <i>Devon and Cornwall Notes and Queries</i> (1941) ‘The death of Miss Beatrix Feodore Clara Augusta Grace ' Cresswell took place at Exeter on the 16th February, 1940, in her seventy-ninth year.’  Her father, the Rev. Richard Cresswell, was a clergyman without cure of souls in the 1881 census;  they lived at Teignmouth.

### Letters

- Letter from March 31st 1888

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
